summary: P1+P2 features tested end-to-end: auto-campaigns (rules, preview, run, log), campaign launch (simulated + karix modes), items/points_ledger schemas, points_ledger CSV ingest, and AI narrative generation. All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend admin/auto-campaigns and admin/historic-data pages render all 6 rule cards / 5 dataset tiles with correct testids. Campaign Manager modal renders Karix section + send-limit-input correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid 'campaign-template-select' is only rendered when active templates exist for the currently selected channels. With a fresh tenant or when default channel is 'whatsapp' (no SMS/RCS templates), the dropdown is replaced by a hint paragraph and the testid is absent. Recommend keeping a stable testid wrapper even when showing the empty hint, to make automation predictable.

issues: Default selected channel is 'whatsapp' which immediately shows 'no active templates' hint; consider defaulting to a channel that has active templates, or auto-selecting the channel that has the most templates.

action_items: (Optional) Wrap CampaignManager template dropdown / no-template-hint with a single stable data-testid='campaign-template-select' for predictable test selectors.
(Optional) Auto-select a channel with active templates when opening the New Campaign modal.
critical_code_review_comments: historic_routes.py is 1450+ lines — exceeds 700-line guideline, recommend splitting (mappers, scheduler, narrative wiring, purge, backfill).
auto_campaigns_routes.py inlines communication imports inside _run_rule to avoid circular imports — fine for now, but worth extracting a thin send-helper module.
ingest_narrative._snapshot uses count_documents on transactions/customers which can be slow at >1M docs; cache snapshot for narrative under TTL if dataset grows.

campaigns_routes.launch_campaign returns 'Linked template not found' as 400 (per spec), but campaign remains in 'draft' — consider marking campaign as 'failed_launch' so the UI can surface the error without re-querying.
_map_points_ledger_row returns (None, error) for type validation but doesn't check that 'reason' length is bounded — could allow injection of long-form text; trim to 500 chars.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all tiles, cards, buttons render; one minor testid placement nit)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ prefixed communication templates, 2 TEST_ prefixed campaigns (simulated + karix), 1 points_ledger ingest job with 3 rows (mobiles 9876501234, 9876501235). Auto-campaign config for birthday_today now enabled with daily_cap=50 and linked to TEST_auto_tpl_*.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2 features fully working. backend_test file is /app/backend/tests/iteration11_p1p2_test.py — covers auto-campaigns CRUD/preview/run-all, campaign launch (sim + karix), schemas, points_ledger ingest + narrative. Campaign creation requires both 'channels' (array) AND 'channel' fields. Narrative may use template_fallback or fundle_brain_gpt5 — both are valid per spec.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Two initial test failures were test-side mismatches (Campaign model requires 'channels' list; LLM call takes 30+ seconds so polling timeout was bumped to 120s). Both fixed in test file.
